text:
(a) An individual may not offer or conduct an instructor training course unless the individual holds an instructor training provider license issued by the department.

(b) An instructor training course must be:

(1) approved by the department;

(2) offered and conducted in accordance with commission rules; and

(3) conducted at a motorcycle school.

(c) The commission by rule shall establish minimum curriculum standards for instructor training courses to be offered to meet the requirement of Section 662.0062 (Eligibility; Application) (a)(1).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 662. Motorcycle Operator Training & Safety
##### § 662.0064 — Instructor Training Courses

(a) An individual may not offer or conduct an instructor training course unless the individual holds an instructor training provider license issued by the department.

(b) An instructor training course must be:

    (1) approved by the department;

    (2) offered and conducted in accordance with commission rules; and

    (3) conducted at a motorcycle school.

(c) The commission by rule shall establish minimum curriculum standards for instructor training courses to be offered to meet the requirement of Section 662.0062 (Eligibility; Application) (a)(1).

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 270 (S.B.478), Sec. 10, eff. January 1, 2024.*

offered and conducted in accordance with commission rules; and
